meta-description: Learn about the fee for service method by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Fee for service
excerpt: A method in which doctors and other health care providers are paid for each service performed. Examples of services include tests and office visits.
content:
A method in which doctors and other health care providers are paid for each service performed. Examples of services include tests and office visits.
